device_name: Vantage Fortian 1.5T, MRT-1550, V8.0 with AiCE Reconstruction Processing Unit for MR
intended_use: Vantage Fortian 1.5T systems are indicated for use as a diagnostic imaging modality that produces cross-sectional transaxial, coronal, sagittal, and oblique images that display anatomic structures of
intended_use_full: Vantage Fortian 1.5T systems are indicated for use as a diagnostic imaging modality that produces cross-sectional transaxial, coronal, sagittal, and oblique images that display anatomic structures of the head or body. Additionally, this system is capable of non-contrast enhanced imaging, such as MRA.
ground_truth: Phantom images and volunteer images; images of diagnostic quality confirmed by review
other_metrics: Predetermined acceptance criteria met for SureVOI Liver, LiverLine+, ProstateLine+, W-SpineLine+; Exsper reduces unfolding artifacts compared to traditional SPEEDER; mART EXP reduces distortion artifacts in readout and slice directions; RDC DWI reduces phase encoding direction distortion; pCASL CBF values met predetermined acceptance criteria; IMC effective in reducing motion artifacts
